_contentOrderDescription: Inside TabStrip container: visible tabs first, then Add Tab button (when showAddTab), then More dropdown (when showMore and overflowTabs.length > 0). Do not reorder.
_propsDescription: showMore: show More dropdown; moreCount: number for More (N) label; overflowTabs: tabs shown in More dropdown when showMore is true; showAddTab: show Add Tab button; variant: default | compact (height). When showMore and overflowTabs have items, overflowMode is manual; otherwise none.
_behavior: Footer does not scroll; overflow is driven by container/browser width.
